{"problem_standardized_math":"Show that, for a quadratic function and with exact line searches, the Polak-Ribiere formula\n\\[\n\\beta_{k+1}^{\\mathrm{PR}}=\\frac{\\nabla f_{k+1}^T(\\nabla f_{k+1}-\\nabla f_k)}{\\|\\nabla f_k\\|^2}\n\\]\nand the Hestenes-Stiefel formula\n\\[\n\\beta_{k+1}^{\\mathrm{HS}}=\\frac{\\nabla f_{k+1}^T(\\nabla f_{k+1}-\\nabla f_k)}{(\\nabla f_{k+1}-\\nabla f_k)^T p_k}\n\\]\nboth reduce to the Fletcher-Reeves formula\n\\[\n\\beta_{k+1}=\\frac{\\|\\nabla f_{k+1}\\|^2}{\\|\\nabla f_k\\|^2}.\n\\]"}
